_coverage_note: Onda H-3.a initial entries: canonical envelope (ADR-0017) + marketdata.trade pilot. Status taxonomy ('draft' / 'stable' / 'deprecated') is independent of the governing ADR's status — see docs/GLOSSARY.md → 'Schema status'. Both entries here start as 'draft' because no runtime consumer exists yet; promotion to 'stable' happens when a stream uses the schema in production (future phase, not Fase Wire).
